raw: Pass admits four people at half price admission. The Museum is open Wednesday-Monday, closed Tuesdays (with the exception of a few school vacation weeks). Advance tickets/reservations are highly recommended , especially on weekends, holidays, school vacation weeks, and TJX $1 Sunday Afternoons. On the first Saturday of each month, the Museum opens at 10:00. Hours are subject to change, please check calendar on ticket purchase pages. The date on the Library Discount Coupon must match the date of museum visit.
